lease_owner.description: Written by scripts/transition-work-item.mjs's compare-and-swap. Equivalent to owner (commit-identity.mjs's leaseHolder() reads either); kept as a distinct property instead of folded into owner so a CAS transition's writer identity is never confused with the human-facing owner field a work item was authored with.

type.description: The category of deliverable this item produces, distinct from state (its lifecycle position). Selects which prompt module/role template frames the work.

assigned_role.description: The config.roles key (maker, checker, self-govern, or a custom crew role) that executes this item. Any role named here must resolve through scripts/agent/resolve-role.mjs like any other; this field only records the assignment, it does not itself grant a role new capability.
